search_document:
User Request: Average order value by month.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Average Order Value by Month
Type: chart
Description: Trend of average order value over the months
Title: Top Products by Revenue
Type: table
Description: Products generating the highest revenue
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue for the selected period

sql_queries.title: Average Order Value by Month
sql_queries.description: Trend of average order value over the months
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, AVG((od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity) * (1 - od.Discount)) AS AverageOrderValue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Products by Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductName, SUM((od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity) * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM "Order Details" od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductID ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.description: Overall revenue for the selected period
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM((od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity) * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM "Order Details" od
